tweets.text:
A man wanted on multiple felony charges in Indiana was taken into custody Wednesday in North Carolina.

Marvin Jose Vasquez-Martinez, 19, a Honduran national unlawfully present in the United States, was arrested by agents with FBI Charlotte, Homeland Security Investigations (HSI) Charlotte, U.S. Secret Service (USSS) Charlotte, and the Iredell County Sheriff’s Office. The arrest was made in coordination with FBI Indianapolis, which utilized technical surveillance methods to assist in locating the fugitive.

Vasquez-Martinez was wanted in Hendricks County, Indiana, on felony charges of rape and child molestation. He fled the Brownsburg area in or around May 2025. His criminal history includes previous arrests for auto theft, resisting law enforcement, and possession of marijuana.

Vasquez-Martinez is currently being held in North Carolina pending extradition to Indiana.
